detail.description:
Get Ready for Bus Escape Color Jam - The Ultimate Parking Puzzle Challenge. It’s a perfect game for mental exercise and strategic thinking

How to play: 
- Tap to move cars, each car go in only 1 direction
- Plan your moves carefully as the parking slot is limited 
- Each type of car can carry 4 - 6 8 stickmen, so strategize your moves to tackle challenging sort puzzles.
- Ensure every passenger gets to their matching buses
- Stuck in jam? Power up a booster to secure a victory with ease

Game F

eventMentions.text: 그거 왜 어제냐 엊그제냐부터 안 채워지고 600/600에서 멈춰있는거죠 만우절이벤트인 줄 알고 순수띠니하게 레벨업만 엄청 햇는데 !! 다 돌려줄 줄 알앗는데 !!! 어.혹시.? 그
2026/02 업데이트 했더니 광고보고 티켓주는것도 사라지고 아이템 없어도 광고보고 하나 받을수있는데 것도 사라지고.... 이제 그만하라는건가봅니다
